fields.name: detailedName
fields.description: detailed name of the location. For a city location it contains city name and country code. For an airport location it contains city name; country code and airport full name

fields.name: timeZoneOffset
fields.description: timezone offset of the location at the date of the API call (including daylight saving time)

fields.name: iataCode
fields.description: IATA code of the location. ([IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) here)

fields.name: relevance
fields.description: score value calculated based on distance and analytics
